title: Capability Checklist
description: Post-task capability usage checklist produced by each agent

taskId.description: ID of the task this checklist covers

agent.description: Agent name that produced this checklist

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the checklist was produced

capabilities.description: Map of capability keys to usage records

used.description: Whether this capability was used on this task

skipReason.description: Why the capability was skipped (required when used=false for required capabilities)
